column1: # Role: Sincos analog encoder support for servo drives requiring high-resolution
#       position feedback. Sincos provides sinusoidal A/B signals with absolute
#       position reference via EnDat or Hiperface protocol.
#   - Supports sincos (analog), SSI (absolute), and incremental encoders
#   0x6000:14 Torque (16b) - Motor torque (when using motor feedback)
